title: Studi'OU
content:
Studi'OU

Anasayfa

Okan Anasayfa

Ana Sayfa

Ana Sayfa

MENU

The third issue of Studi’OU, the academic journal of the Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture at Istanbul Okan University, has been published in March 2026.

The journal seeks to advance scholarly knowledge by publishing original research articles, critical essays, and theoretical discussions in the fields of art, design, architecture, and art history. Studi’OU emphasizes not only the study of individual artistic and design practices but also their broader social, cultural, and historical contexts, offering a critical platform for interdisciplinary dialogue. By fostering a connection between theoretical frameworks and applied practices, the journal welcomes contributions that explore the intersections of creative production, cultural theory, and societal transformation.
